formats.name: Meta - May 2026

matchups.howTheyWin: Fusion midrange; ends on Mirrorjade (non-targeting banish each turn) + backrow, grinds with GY recursion.
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Ash Branded Fusion / Aluber's search; Ghost Belle the GY recursion.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Mirrorjade survives battle/floats — bounce or banish it, don't try to destroy it; Duster/Storm their backrow.

matchups.howTheyWin: Fast Fusion dragons + floats (frequently Branded engine).
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Ash the Ketu/Rahu (or Branded Fusion) search.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Break the boss; watch for fusion floats on removal.

matchups.howTheyWin: Synchro fairies (Power Patron engine) climbing into negates/removal + traps.
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Ash the Power Patron / Elfnote search; Imperm the Synchro body.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Stop the first Synchro; break the board going second.

matchups.howTheyWin: Magistus equip engine + Fairy Tail - Snow control; loops Snow + Magistus equips.
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Ash the Magistus / Snow search; Imperm the equip target.

matchups.howTheyWin: Fusion beatdown (Sabre Dancer / Cat Dancer) + GY recursion.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Remove the boss; they fold to disruption + board breakers.

matchups.howTheyWin: Banish-and-return Link combos + the Maliss <C> trap set as disruption.
matchups.chokepointTheirs:
Ash the first

search; bait the traps before your real play.

matchups.howTheyWin: Ritual control + Ryzeal Rank-4 Xyz package; disruption via traps + detaches.
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Ash the first Ryzeal/Mitsurugi search; Droll caps the chains.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Handtraps over breakers game 1; side breakers for the backrow.

matchups.howTheyWin: Ritual DARK warriors; floats + grinds with traps (Great Purification / Tempest).
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Ash the Magatama / Prayers search; bait or clear their traps.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Backrow removal first, then push through the bodies.

matchups.howTheyWin: Power Patron engine (DoomZ cousins) into Xyz negates; Artmage splash.
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Ash the Power Patron / Artmage search.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Break the Xyz board; remove the equipped boss.

matchups.howTheyWin: Fusion (Albaz/Branded) toolbox; contact-fusion into big bodies.
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Ash the Fusion starter (Branded Fusion / Predaplant search).

matchups.howTheyWin: Engine/control splash (Radiant Typhoon enables an Xyz/Synchro shell).
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Confirm from a guide — newer; Ash the enabler search.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Break the board; play around its disruption (verify).

matchups.howTheyWin: Spell-based control; Engage draws, Kagari/Shizuku grind, Hornet Drones tokens, Widow Anchor steals.
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Droll / Ash the Engage chain; they want an EMPTY board — clog it.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Don't over-extend into their Spells; go wide and fast.

matchups.howTheyWin: Attribute-toolbox beatdown (Razen / Caesar) + K9 engine; resource grind.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Their bosses are beatdown-y — out-grind + remove Caesar.

matchups.howTheyWin: Synchro engine — White Forest spells trigger off Synchro/Sinful Spoils; Azamina splash.
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Ash the White Forest / Sinful Spoils search.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Stop the first Synchro; clear the board.

matchups.howTheyWin: Fiend/Azamina swarm into Fusion negates (often Fiendsmith).
matchups.chokepointTheirs: Ash the first search; Belle the Fiendsmith/Azamina GY plays.
matchups.chokepointOurs: Break the Fusion board with non-targeting removal.

formats.notes: Auto-built from ygoprodeck tournament lists. Pick your deck as primary, then refine each matchup's plan. Define their end boards in Testing -> Going second to practise breaking them.
